data.title: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes: BTC may have bottomed out, but US stocks may still have room to fall
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes said on the social platform that Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell has sent a signal that quantitative tightening (QT) will basically end on April 1. Next, the market needs to pay attention to the SLR regulatory exemption or the restart of quantitative easing (QE) to further strengthen. For Bitcoin, he believes that $77,000 may have become the bottom, but US stocks may still have further room to fall until the Federal Reserve fully turns to support the Trump administration, so it is recommended to remain flexible and hold cash.

data.title: Bitnomial Withdraws SEC Lawsuit, Begins XRP Futures Trading
data.description:
Bitnomial ends its lawsuit against the SEC and launches CFTC-approved XRP futures contracts.
source: https://coincu.com/327481-bitnomial-xrp-futures-launch-2

data.title: The band address once again increased its ETH holdings, and the average holding price dropped to $2,401, with a current floating loss of $5.88 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News @ai_9684xtpa monitoring shows that the band address that opened a position of 13,306 ETH at an average price of $2,471 on 02.26 has added another 2,467 ETH, reducing the average price of holdings to $2,401. The address currently has a floating loss of 5.88 million US dollars.
On-chain data shows that the address had pledged ETH to Aave and borrowed 8 million USDT 16 hours ago, including:
5 million USDT was recharged to Binance, and then the equivalent ETH was withdrawn;
3 million USDT was recharged to OKX, or plans to further increase ETH positions.

data.title: Kraken nears $1.5B deal allowing it to offer US crypto futures: Report
data.description:
Crypto exchange Kraken is reportedly closing in on a $1.5 billion acquisition of trading platform NinjaTrader, a move that would expand Kraken’s customer base and enable it to offer crypto futures and derivatives in the US.
The deal could be confirmed by the morning of March 20 in the US, The Wall Street Journal said in a March 19 report, citing people familiar with the matter.
Kraken’s expanded offerings would be made possible through NinjaTrader’s registration as a Futures Commission Merchant
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/kraken-reportedly-nears-billion-dollar-deal-allowing-futures-trading-us-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain data shows that the WLFI token is suspected of testing the transfer function. Five hours ago, the WLFI token transferred 199,999,953 WLFI to a certain address.

data.title: The two new addresses have withdrawn a total of 2.6447 million OM from Binance, with a cumulative value of approximately US$21.49 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain analyst @OnchainDataNerd monitored that two newly created wallets recently withdrew large amounts of OM tokens from Binance:
Wallet 0xE2f first withdrew 2 million OMs, worth about $17.07 million.
Wallet 0x9a4 further withdrew 644,700 OMs within 4 hours, worth about $4.42 million.
The total of the two is 2,644,700 OMs, with a cumulative value of about $21.49 million.

data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/327474-trump-digital-asset-summit

data.title: Federal Reserve Raises Inflation Forecasts Amid Economic Shifts
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's economic outlook has undergone significant changes, yet interest rate expectations have not fully adjusted to these shifts, raising the threshold for potential rate cuts. Federal Reserve officials have consecutively increased the core PCE inflation forecast, moving from 2.2% in September 2023 to 2.5% in December 2023, and further to 2.8% by March 2024, with projections extending to the end of 2025. Some officials have even raised their inflation forecasts for 2026 and 2027. Among 19 officials, 18 perceive inflation risks as tilted to the upside, suggesting that the Federal Reserve might require a notable weakening in the labor market before considering rate cuts.

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell attributed the upward revision in inflation forecasts "almost entirely" to changes in trade policy. Former Federal Reserve officials believe that the institution may find it challenging to overlook the inflationary pressures caused by tariffs and might wait for more evidence of economic slowdown before taking action.

data.title: A whale recharged $7.37 million USDC to HyperLiquid within 16 hours and bought 400,000 HYPE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain analyst @OnchainLens monitored that in the past 16 hours, a whale recharged $7.37 million USDC to HyperLiquid, of which $5.94 million was used to buy 400,059 HYPEs at an average price of about $14.85.
Currently, the whale wallet still holds $1.42 million USDC, which may be used to continue to increase HYPE positions.
